title: senecio johnstonianus
intro: Senecio johnstonianus, also known as Johnston's ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds, due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Senecio johnstonianus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
